Class HeatmapExt

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl.HeatmapExt
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Settings, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
public class HeatmapExt extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, KeYGuiExtension.Settings
Extension adapter for Heatmap

  • Method Details

    • getMainMenuActions

      public List<Action> getMainMenuActions(MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getMainMenuActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the window of the main menu
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction

    • getToolbar

      public JToolBar getToolbar(MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
      A toolbar which will be embedded into the main window.s
      Specified by:
      getToolbar in interface KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the parent of the toolbar
      Returns:
      non-null

    • getSettings
